caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, large headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold lettering sits at a dark table in a recording studio. He wears a gold watch and a gold chain. In front of him is a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him, a white backdrop features a logo with five stars and the words "UNIQUE HUSTLE" repeated vertically. A sign above him reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table, there is a black box and a blue container with "BOSS TALK" branding. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands; he begins by pointing upward, then opens his palm, and eventually brings both hands together in front of him. A circular logo containing a microphone and the word "TALK" is visible in the bottom left corner of the scene.
